entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: Yara below the age na 13 suna encouraged don amfani da the manhaja, amma under adult supervision. However, mu kada a knowingly collect ko process any bayanan sirri daga yara under the age na 13 da hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age na 13 daga providing mu tare da any bayanan sirri ba tare da parental consent. If kai suna a uba ko uwa na a yaro under 13 years na age da kai believe naka yaro has provided mu tare da bayanan sirri, mu zai take necessary actions da notify kai if necessary. There shi ne no fixed timeline don the necessary action as it depends a kan the volume na queries mu handle da namu available workforce.

entries.source: Curious learners exploring history, humanities, argument, and big questions.
entries.value: Curious masu koyo exploring tarihi, humanities, hujja, da big tambayoyi.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel alive without confusing simulation for sources.
entries.value: Curious masu koyo who want tarihi da ideas don feel alive ba tare da confusing kwaikwayo don tushe-tushe.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Masu koyo masu sha'awa da suke son tarihi da ra'ayoyi su ji suna da mahalli, za a iya muhawara a kansu, kuma suna da rai ba tare da rasa bin shaida ba.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Masu koyo masu sha'awa, dalibai, iyaye, da masu koyar da kansu waɗanda suke son wurin farawa mai daɗi.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces for every school community.
entries.value: Na musamman koyon AI spaces don kowane makaranta community.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces with data confidentiality.
entries.value: Wuraren koyon AI na musamman tare da sirrin bayanai.
Na musamman abun ciki

entries.source: Custom content, prompts, and workflows can be adapted around NCERT needs and school-specific classroom priorities.
entries.value: Na musamman abun ciki, saƙonni, da tsarukan aiki can be adapted a kusa da NCERT yana buƙatar da makaranta-specific aji priorities.

entries.source: Customer Safety & Privacy is our Priority
entries.value: Customer Safety & Privacy shi ne namu Priority
